canonical_definition: Evaluation metric that treats VLM outputs as discriminative by comparing token probabilities to re-rank answer candidates, used as a baseline in compositionality tasks.
papers: Learning to Ask: WhenLLMAgents Meet Unclear Instruction
Read to Hear: A Zero-Shot Pronunciation Assessment Using Textual Descriptions andLLMs
